title: Device Settings - Check if setting's value persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Device settings values persist after navigating away from settings tab and after killing and restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
Change a device setting (e.g., ANC mode, Transparency mode, or Equalizer preset).
Close the settings tab by tapping the back arrow or swiping back.
Verify the Home screen is displayed.
Tap on the same device name again to return to Device Settings.
Observe that the previously changed setting still shows the updated value.
Close the app (kill the process from the recent apps list or OS app switcher).
Navigate back to Device Settings for the same device.
expected: The device setting value persists and remains the same after closing the settings tab, navigating back to Home, returning to settings, and after killing and restarting the app.
